rationale: Both papers are centrally about diffusion through interpersonal networks and word-of-mouth influence: the citing paper simulates seeding effects in social networks, while the cited paper develops an individual-level network diffusion model estimating network, influencer, and adopter effects. Given this strong construct/method overlap and plausible use as a mechanism/foundation source (despite only one DOI-matched reference and no snippet context), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
